Ray (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $75,305,995Details
International Box Office $49,517,099
Worldwide Box Office $124,823,094
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,039,730 (26.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,006 opening theaters/2,474 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $137,316,206

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 29th, 2004 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: January 21st, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: February 1st, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for depiction of drug addiction, sexuality and some thematic elements
Running Time: 152 minutes
Award nomination: 2005 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Plot point: African Americans, Biography, Musicians, Performing Arts
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Bristol Bay Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
